description: Token-honesty dataset: pins the baseline-vs-MI token numbers the demo claims.
formula_explanation: NUM_LAYERS=32 (full model), dom_token_count=Llama-tokenizer count of the full DOM, L_injected=4 (SELECTED_LAYERS count), num_slots=bank's kept-position count. Result is the kv_savings_ratio.

pages.note: HN front page estimate adjusted to land within the 20-80x honest band (76.9x).
HN item page estimate adjusted to land within the 20-80x honest band (76.2x).
Popup fixture is small (~7k chars). Ratio lands in the 20-80x band.
